title: Market Brief — Sunday, May 24, 2026
summary: B200 compute is severely scarce at 12% util-avail, while H100 sits tight at 18% and A100 loosens to 21%; H200 is the outlier with 34% availability as workloads migrate to Blackwell. B200 spot surged 9.4% day-over-day to $4.87/hr, the biggest single-day GPU price move in the dataset, confirming demand is outrunning supply on the newest silicon.
paragraphs: B200 compute is severely scarce at 12% util-avail, while H100 sits tight at 18% and A100 loosens to 21%; H200 is the outlier with 34% availability as workloads migrate to Blackwell. B200 spot surged 9.4% day-over-day to $4.87/hr, the biggest single-day GPU price move in the dataset, confirming demand is outrunning supply on the newest silicon.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), B200 inference runs $4.45/M tokens for Llama 70B, making it the only GPU where medium-tier pricing breaks even. DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.45/M output on hardware costing roughly $0.55/M TCO-adjusted is selling at a loss of approximately $0.10 per million tokens. Provider grades: OpenAI Strong (margin-rich o3 Pro anchors portfolio), Anthropic Neutral, Google Neutral, DeepSeek Burning Cash, open-source Burning Cash.

B200 spot at $4.87/hr is overvalued short-term given 180% annualized vol on H200 signals incoming Blackwell price discovery chaos and reversion risk. A100 at $1.07/hr median with utilization climbing 4.2pp monthly is undervalued for cost-conscious inference; buy A100 spot, sell H200 exposure.
bullets: 12% util-avail on B200 marks the tightest compute class in the market today.
18% util-avail on H100 keeps flagship training hardware in scarce territory.
$80/M output for o3 Pro is 178x more expensive than the cheapest tracked model at $0.18/M.
21.78 LLMflation index means frontier token costs have fallen 78% from the GPT-4 launch baseline.
$4.87/hr B200 spot jumped 9.4% in a single day, the largest move across all GPU classes.
53% of advertised B200 offerings sit unrented despite severe utilization scarcity, signaling fragmented broker liquidity.
